entry.title: IDC W15QKN13D0099 (P00010) awarded to GATR TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION IS BEING ISSUED TO IDENTIFY HARDWARE OBSOLESCENCE. THIS EFFORT IS IN SUPPORT OF PROJECT MANAGER WARFIGHTER INFORMATION NETWORK - TACTICAL (OM WIN-T)

ns1:claimantProgramCode.description: ALL OTHERS NOT IDENTIFIABLE TO ANY OTHER PROCUREMENT PROGRAM

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING AND WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:research.description: SMALL BUSINESS INNOVATION RESEARCH PROGRAM PHASE III ACTION

entry.title: IDC W15QKN13D0099 (P00011) awarded to GATR TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00011 TO CONTRACT NUMBER W15QKN-13-D-0099 IS TO REDUCE THE RANGE PRICING OF GATR PART NUMBER ISA-100, 1.2M BACKPACK WITH PROTECTIVE COMPONENT BAGS LISTED UNDER CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBERS 4082 AND 5082 RESULTING FROM GREATER PRODUCTION EFFICIENCIES.

ns1:claimantProgramCode.description: ALL OTHERS NOT IDENTIFIABLE TO ANY OTHER PROCUREMENT PROGRAM

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING AND WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:research.description: SMALL BUSINESS INNOVATION RESEARCH PROGRAM PHASE III ACTION

entry.title: IDC W15QKN13D0099 (P00012) awarded to GATR TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IN ORDER TO SUSTAIN THE INFLATABLE SATELLITE ANTENNA SYSTEMS PROCURED UNDER PREVIOUS DELIVERY ORDERS, THE GOVERNMENT REQUIRES ADDITIONAL EQUIPMENT ASSEMBLIES, SUB-ASSEMBLIES, COMPONENTS, SPARES AND REPAIR PARTS TO REPLACE DEFECTIVE LINE UNITS AND PROVIDE CONTINUOUS SUPPORT TO MEET WARFIGHTER REQUIREMENTS. THEREFORE, THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00012 TO CONTRACT NUMBER W15QKN-13-D-0099 IS TO INCORPORATE ADDITIONAL SPARE PARTS AND COMPONENTS, MANY OF WHICH ARE DERIVED FROM EXISTING CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBERS ON THE BASIC CONTRACT, WITH FIRM-FIXED-PRICE RANGE-QUANTITY PRICING.

ns1:claimantProgramCode.description: ALL OTHERS NOT IDENTIFIABLE TO ANY OTHER PROCUREMENT PROGRAM

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING AND WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:research.description: SMALL BUSINESS INNOVATION RESEARCH PROGRAM PHASE III ACTION

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00013 TO CONTRACT NUMBER W15QKN-13-D-0099 IS TO REFLECT GATR TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S CHANGE IN PHYSICAL ADDRESS.

entry.title: IDC W15QKN13D0099 (P00014) awarded to GATR TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00014 TO CONTRACT NUMBER W15QKN-13-D-0099 IS TO PUSH GATR TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'S CHANGE IN PHYSICAL ADDRESS TO THE FEDERAL PROCUREMENT DATA SYSTEM - NEXT GENERATION.

entry.title: IDC W15QKN13D0099 (P00015) awarded to GATR TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE SMALL BUSINESS INNOVATIVE RESEARCH (SBIR) PHASE III CONTRACT FROM A FIVE YEAR INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) FIRM FIXED PRICE CONTRACT TO A 10 YEAR CONTRACT IN WHICH DELIVERY AND TASK ORDERS WILL BE ISSUED. IN ADDITION, THE CEILING IS BEING INCREASED BY $522,498,247.00 TO SUPPORT VARIOUS PROGRAMS OF RECORDS (PORS) REQUIREMENTS. THIS EFFORT IS IN SUPPORT OF PROGRAM MANAGER (PM) TACTICAL NETWORK (TN) COMMERCIAL SATELLITE TERMINAL PROGRAM (CSTP).

ns1:claimantProgramCode.description: ALL OTHERS NOT IDENTIFIABLE TO ANY OTHER PROCUREMENT PROGRAM

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING AND WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:research.description: SMALL BUSINESS INNOVATION RESEARCH PROGRAM PHASE III ACTION

entry.title: IDC W15QKN13D0099 (P00016) awarded to GATR TECHNOLOGIES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00016 TO CONTRACT NUMBER W15QKN-13-D-0099 IS TO INCORPORATE THE UNITED STATES - REPUBLIC OF KOREA STATUS OF FORCES AGREEMENT AND STATUS OF UNITED STATES ARMED FORCES IN JAPAN INTO THE BASE CONTRACT. FURTHER, FAR 52.245-9, USE AND CHARGES, HAS BEEN INCORPORATED AS AN UPDATED TERM AND CONDITION. ADDITIONALLY, THIS MODIFICATION CAPTURES CHANGES AT THE CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBER LEVEL.

ns1:claimantProgramCode.description: ALL OTHERS NOT IDENTIFIABLE TO ANY OTHER PROCUREMENT PROGRAM
